title: Rohan's Mixed-Up Monday
synopsis: When Rohan wears his pajamas to school by mistake, he thinks his day is ruined. But with help from his diverse group of friends, he discovers that being different can be fun and that true friends accept you just as you are.

pages.text: Rohan woke up late on Monday morning. His dark hair stuck up in funny spikes. "Oh no!" he said, looking at his clock. He jumped out of bed and got dressed quickly. Too quickly.

illustration.description: A young South Asian boy with messy black hair and big brown eyes sitting up in bed looking surprised at an alarm clock. His bedroom has colorful posters and toys scattered around. Warm morning sunlight streams through the window creating a cozy, slightly chaotic scene.
illustration.alt: Rohan looking surprised at his alarm clock in his messy bedroom

pages.text: Rohan brushed his teeth and grabbed his backpack. He ran downstairs to eat breakfast. His mom was packing lunches. "Have a good day, beta!" she called as he rushed out the door.

illustration.description: A warm kitchen scene with Rohan's mom, a woman with long black hair in a colorful sari, packing lunch boxes. The kitchen has bright yellow walls and family photos. Rohan is rushing toward the door with his backpack bouncing.
illustration.alt: Rohan's mom in the kitchen waving goodbye as Rohan rushes out

pages.text: At school, Rohan sat down at his desk. His friend Maya looked at him funny. "Rohan," she whispered, "why are you wearing pajamas?" Rohan looked down. Oh no! He was wearing his dinosaur pajamas!

illustration.description: A diverse classroom with Rohan sitting at his desk wearing bright blue dinosaur-print pajamas, looking shocked with his mouth open wide. Maya, a girl with curly red hair and freckles, is pointing and giggling. Other diverse children in the background are also noticing and smiling.
illustration.alt: Rohan in dinosaur pajamas sitting in classroom looking embarrassed

pages.text: Rohan's face turned red. He tried to hide behind his math book. "This is the worst day ever," he thought. All the other kids were wearing regular clothes. He felt very silly.

illustration.description: Rohan peeking over a large colorful math textbook with only his worried brown eyes and messy hair visible. His cheeks are pink with embarrassment. The classroom background shows other children in normal school clothes doing morning activities.
illustration.alt: Rohan hiding behind his math book looking embarrassed

pages.text: At recess, Rohan didn't want to play. He sat under a tree by himself. His dinosaur pajamas had little T-Rex faces all over them. The T-Rex looked happy, but Rohan did not.

illustration.description: Rohan sitting alone under a large oak tree on the playground, looking sad with his chin in his hands. His bright blue dinosaur pajamas contrast with the green grass and leaves. In the background, diverse children are playing happily on swings and slides.
illustration.alt: Rohan sitting sadly alone under a tree during recess

pages.text: Maya came over with their friends Carlos and Zara. "Why aren't you playing?" asked Carlos. He had kind brown eyes. "I look silly," Rohan said sadly. "Everyone is staring at me."

illustration.description: Three children approaching Rohan under the tree - Maya with curly red hair and freckles, Carlos a Latino boy with warm brown eyes and a gentle smile, and Zara a Black girl with beautiful braided hair. They all look concerned and caring as they gather around their friend.
illustration.alt: Maya, Carlos, and Zara approaching Rohan with concerned expressions

pages.text: "I think your pajamas are cool!" said Zara. "I love dinosaurs!" Carlos nodded. "Remember when I wore my soccer cleats to art class?" Maya laughed. "And I wore my tutu to gym class once!"

illustration.description: The four friends sitting in a circle under the tree, all smiling and laughing together. Zara is pointing excitedly at the dinosaurs on Rohan's pajamas. The scene is warm and friendly with dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves above them.
illustration.alt: The four friends sitting together laughing and talking under the tree

pages.text: Rohan started to feel better. His friends didn't think he was weird. "But what if other kids laugh?" he asked. "Then we'll laugh too!" said Maya. "Laughing is fun!"

illustration.description: Rohan's expression changing from worried to hopeful, his big brown eyes brightening as he looks at his supportive friends. The group is animated and cheerful, with Maya making an encouraging gesture and all the children showing warm, accepting smiles.
illustration.alt: Rohan looking hopeful as his friends encourage him

pages.text: After recess, something amazing happened. Mrs. Johnson, their teacher, announced, "Today we're learning about dinosaurs!" She looked at Rohan and winked. "Perfect timing, Rohan!"

illustration.description: Mrs. Johnson, a cheerful teacher with short gray hair and colorful glasses, standing at the front of the classroom pointing to a dinosaur poster. She's winking at Rohan, who looks surprised and delighted. The diverse classroom is full of excited children raising their hands.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Johnson announcing dinosaur lesson while winking at Rohan

pages.text: "Rohan, would you like to be our dinosaur expert today?" asked Mrs. Johnson. Rohan stood up proudly. His pajamas didn't feel silly anymore. They felt special!

illustration.description: Rohan standing confidently at his desk with a big proud smile, his dinosaur pajamas now looking like the perfect outfit for the lesson. His classmates are looking at him with admiration and excitement. The classroom walls show colorful dinosaur learning materials.
illustration.alt: Rohan standing proudly in his dinosaur pajamas in front of the class

pages.text: Rohan taught the class about T-Rex and Triceratops. Everyone loved his dinosaur pajamas. "You're so lucky!" said Emma, a girl with blonde pigtails. "I wish I had dinosaur pajamas!"

illustration.description: Rohan at the front of the class enthusiastically explaining about dinosaurs, using hand gestures to show how big they were. Emma and other diverse classmates are listening with wide, amazed eyes. The scene is energetic and joyful with bright classroom colors.
illustration.alt: Rohan teaching the class about dinosaurs while wearing his pajamas

pages.text: At lunch, everyone wanted to sit with the "dinosaur boy." Rohan felt happy and proud. His mom had packed his favorite sandwich. This Monday was turning out pretty great!

illustration.description: The school cafeteria with Rohan sitting at a crowded lunch table surrounded by many diverse friends, all chatting and laughing together. Rohan is beaming with joy while eating his sandwich. The cafeteria is bright and welcoming with colorful lunch trays and happy children.
illustration.alt: Rohan surrounded by friends at the lunch table, looking very happy

pages.text: When Rohan got home, he told his mom about his day. "Sometimes being different is the best thing ever!" he said. His mom smiled and gave him a big hug. "You're right, beta. You're perfectly you."

illustration.description: Rohan and his mom in a warm embrace in their cozy living room. Both are smiling happily, with Rohan still in his dinosaur pajamas looking confident and joyful. The room has warm lighting and family photos on the walls, creating a loving, accepting atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Rohan hugging his mom at home, both looking happy and content

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Rohan accidentally wear to school?
questions.explanation: Rohan was rushing and accidentally wore his dinosaur pajamas to school instead of regular clothes.

questions.question: How did Rohan's friends make him feel better?
choices: They shared their own silly mistakes
They told him to go home
questions.explanation: Maya, Carlos, and Zara helped by sharing times they wore the wrong clothes too, showing Rohan he wasn't alone.

questions.question: What subject did Mrs. Johnson teach that day?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Johnson announced they would learn about dinosaurs, which made Rohan's pajamas perfect for the lesson.

questions.question: How did Rohan feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: By the end, Rohan felt happy and proud because his friends supported him and his pajamas helped with the dinosaur lesson.

questions.question: What did Rohan learn about being different?
choices: It can be special and good
questions.explanation: Rohan learned that being different can actually be wonderful and special, especially with good friends who accept you.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Fill in the missing words from Rohan's adventure:

blanks.sentence: Rohan woke up late and got dressed too ____.
He accidentally wore his ____ pajamas to school.
His friends Maya, Carlos, and ____ came to help him.

pages.title: What Happens Next?
pages.text: Choose the best words to complete these sentences:

blanks.sentence: Mrs. Johnson announced they would learn about ____.
Rohan felt ____ and proud at the end of the day.
Sometimes being ____ is the best thing ever!
